race.comment: SNALLYGASTER (7) is a promising type who is going well this campaign leading off wide draws. Much better gate this time for first try at this trip and will take catching. ATTAIN (4) was runner-up at Pakenham two back then made late ground off a wide gate last time. Better draw and best figures stack up. MURPH (2) was safely held in higher grade fresh then made late ground last time. Is a third-up winner and gets a chance to find his best. ROUND TWO (12) could manage only fifth here last time over the sharper trip. Goes well over this course and distance and expected to improve sharply. DELIGHTFUL SHECKY (1) is also a third-up winner and will find this much easier.
